data.title: Booz Allen Hamilton to Host Conference Call to Discuss Fourth Quarter and Full Year Fiscal 2026 Results on Friday, May 22, 2026
data.description: A conference call is scheduled to be held by Booz Allen in McLean, Virginia at 8 a.m. EDT on Friday, May 22, 2026. The call aims to review the financial performance for the Fourth Quarter and Full Year of Fiscal Year 2026.

data.title: Microspheres Market worth $6.47 billion by 2031 - Exclusive Report by MarketsandMarkets™
data.description: On April 10, 2026, in Delray Beach, Florida, market research company MarketsandMarkets reported that the Microspheres Market is segmented by type (hollow, solid), raw material (glass, ceramic, fly ash, polymer, metallic), and application (building & construction, medical technology, cosmetics & personal care, automotive, oil...). This market analysis includes important data on market dynamics, growth factors, opportunities, and challenges within the industry.

data.title: Followme Releases 2025 Annual Trading Report: Trading Behaviour, Capital Flows, and Profitability Insights
data.description: A report released from KUALA LUMPUR, Malaysia discloses that throughout 2025, there was a significant diversity in global monetary policies and a notable surge in markets, with artificial intelligence playing a pivotal role in revolutionizing retail trading. A comprehensive analysis conducted by Followme on real account closure data from January 1 to December 31, 2025, offers detailed insights into the trading behavior of the community during this period. The report sheds light on crucial statistics and trends, showcasing the impact of these factors on the trading landscape.

data.title: Covenant AI quits Bittensor citing 'decentralization theatre,' as TAO plunges 18%. Founder refutes claims.
data.description: Covenant AI announced its decision to withdraw from Bittensor citing concerns over the excessive control exerted on subnets and the substantial scale of TAO token sales. Nevertheless, the founder of Bittensor refuted all accusations.

data.title: Hong Kong authorizes stablecoin licenses to Anchorpoint and HSBC, marking the first approvals under the HKMA's new regulations.
data.description: The first stablecoin licenses have been granted in Hong Kong by the HKMA, with approvals given to Anchorpoint Financial and HSBC's Hong Kong banking arm. This marks a significant development in the region's financial sector, as stablecoins gain regulatory acceptance. The move reflects the growing popularity of stablecoins, which are cryptocurrencies pegged to a stable asset like the U.S. dollar. By issuing these licenses, Hong Kong is setting a precedent in the industry. This decision will likely have a positive impact on the adoption of stablecoins, with Anchorpoint Financial and HSBC leading the way.

data.title: High Templar Tech Limited Files Its Annual Report on Form 20-F
data.description: In Xiamen, China, on April 10, 2026, High Templar Tech Limited disclosed the submission of its annual report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025, to the Securities and Exchange Commission. This filing, made on April 10, 2026 (U.S. Time), is significant as it provides valuable insights into the company's financial status and performance. High Templar Tech Limited, traded on the NYSE under the symbol HTT, encourages investors and stakeholders to review the detailed report for a comprehensive understanding of its operations. For further information, the complete update can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Digital Tails Group and Galactic Armory Announce Strategic Partnership to Scale 3D Maker Ecosystem
data.description: A new collaboration between Digital Tails Group and Galactic Armory has been announced, signaling a significant step forward for both companies. This long-term strategic partnership aims to develop cutting-edge digital tools tailored for the worldwide 3D printing and cosplay enthusiast community. Galactic Armory, previously focused on digital assets, will undergo a transformation with the help of this alliance. This partnership promises to bring innovative solutions to the forefront, catering to a broad audience and showcasing the potential of merging technology with creative industries.

data.title: Unito Expands Partnership with Asana, Now Included in Enterprise Offering for AI-Driven Workflow Integration
data.description: Unito has recently launched an add-on for Asana users, providing a comprehensive two-way integration platform. The integration connects Asana with essential enterprise systems, aiming to streamline work processes and enhance AI-powered work management. The announcement was made on April 9, 2026, in Montreal.

data.title: Debug Pest Control Expands Connecticut Presence with Acquisition of Bee Smart Pest Control
data.description: Debug Pest Control recently acquired Bee Smart Pest Control, a well-regarded company located in East Hampton, Connecticut. This acquisition marks an expansion for Debug within Connecticut, enabling them to cater to a larger customer base while upholding Bee Smart's reputation for dependable services. With this acquisition, Debug Pest Control now has a stronger foothold in Connecticut and aims to continue offering quality pest control solutions to more clients.

data.title: Todd Owen Marshall of Deerfield Beach FL, Florida and Boss Marketing Group announce their attendance at the PAWS Gala benefiting the Broward County Humane Society
data.description: Florida resident Todd Owen Marshall, along with his company Boss Marketing Group, will be present at the upcoming PAWS Gala on April 25th, 2026. The event aims to support the Broward County Humane Society. Todd Marshall, hailing from Deerfield Beach, FL, will be among the attendees, highlighting the importance of community involvement. This charitable gala is expected to gather significant attention and support, showcasing the commitment to animal welfare in the region. Todd Marshall and Boss Marketing Group's participation underscores their dedication to philanthropic endeavors and their desire to contribute positively to society.

data.title: Cascades to Release First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 7, 2026 and Provides Updated Outlook
data.description: In Kingsey Falls, Quebec, on April 10, 2026, Cascades Inc. will announce its Q1 2026 financial results before the market opens on May 7, 2026. The company (TSX: CAS) has scheduled a conference call at 9:00 AM Eastern Time on the same day to review the results. Interested parties can join the call via phone or other methods.

data.title: Cresco Labs Opens Sunnyside Bridgeport, Expanding Access in the Ohio Valley
data.description: Cresco Labs Inc. has opened its Sunnyside Bridgeport location at 435 Main Street in Bridgeport, Ohio, marking the Company’s seventh dispensary in the state and 73rd nationwide. CEO Charlie Bachtell expressed pride in joining the Bridgeport community and providing a dependable shopping experience for Belmont County residents. With Ohio being a crucial market for Cresco, this expansion reflects the company's commitment to meeting the needs of customers across the country.
